items.headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Stock Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
items.summary: Comcast (CMCSA) is back on many investors’ screens after recent share price swings, with the stock down about 1% over the past month and about 19% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Comcast. Those recent swings sit within a tougher run overall, with the share price falling about 19% over the past 3 months and the 1 year total shareholder return down about 22%. This points to fading momentum as investors reassess Comcast’s risks and opportunities at a US$24.50 share price. If...

items.headline: Comcast offering payouts in $117.5M settlement. Are you eligible?
items.summary: Comcast has reached a $117.5 million settlement stemming from a cyberattack that exposed the personal information of Xfinity customers in 2023.

items.headline: Comcast Bets On Bilingual World Cup Coverage To Deepen Xfinity Engagement
items.summary: Comcast is preparing extensive bilingual coverage for the 2026 FIFA World Cup across its Xfinity platforms. The company plans to integrate FOX Sports and Telemundo streams with features such as RealTime4K, Multiview, and AI-powered highlights. FOX One will launch on Xumo Stream Box, aligning English and Spanish content in a single streaming hub.
